    attack() - Method in class com.risk.controller.MapController
    After gather countries and dices info, pass them to model to execute the attack
    attack(Country) - Method in class com.risk.model.Country
    Attack another country
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Method for attack operation
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    attack phaseNumber method
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.AggressiveStrategy
    Attack method always attack with the strongest country until it cannot attack anymore
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.BenevolentStrategy
    Attack method never attacks
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.CheaterStrategy
    Attack method automatically conquers all the neighbors of all its countries
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.HumanStrategy
    Method for attack operation
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in interface com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    attack method
    attack(Country, String, Country, String, boolean) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.RandomStrategy
    Attacks a random number of times, each attack chooses a country as attacking country and one of its adjacent enemy countries as defending country
    ATTACK_IMPOSSIBLE - Enum constant in enum com.risk.common.Action

    execute() - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    For the computer player to orderly execute reinforcement(), attack() and fortification method
    execute() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.AggressiveStrategy
    Orderly execute reinforcement(), attack() and fortification method
    execute() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.BenevolentStrategy
    Orderly execute reinforcement(), attack() and fortification method
    execute() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.CheaterStrategy
    Orderly execute reinforcement(), attack() and fortification method
    execute() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.HumanStrategy
    Not need
    execute() - Method in interface com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    for the computer player, orderly execute the reinforcement, attack and fortification methods
    execute() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.RandomStrategy
    Orderly execute reinforcement(), attack() and fortification method
    exit() - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.View
    Exit map editor, show main menu
    exit() - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.ViewController
    Handler for btnExit

    F

    FileInfoMenu - Class in com.risk.model
    Instruction: Within Model's loadFile() method if file is valid call setValidationResult(true, validInfo) else call setValidationResult(false, invalidInfo) then call update();
    FileInfoMenu() - Constructor for class com.risk.model.FileInfoMenu
    default ctor
    FileInfoMenuView - Class in com.risk.view
    Observer class, display the selected file relative info
    FileInfoMenuView() - Constructor for class com.risk.view.FileInfoMenuView
    default ctor
    finishExchange() - Method in class com.risk.model.CardModel
    determine whether is is ready to finish the exchange card process
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Method for fortification operation
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.AggressiveStrategy
    Fortification method maximize aggregation of forces in one country
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.BenevolentStrategy
    Fortification method move armies to weaker countries
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.CheaterStrategy
    fortification method doubles the number of armies on its countries that have neighbors that belong to other players.
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.HumanStrategy
    Method for fortification operation
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in interface com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    fortification method
    fortification(Country, Country, int) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.RandomStrategy
    Randomly fortificates a country by a random number of armies
    fortification(Country, Country, String) - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    fortification(Country, Country, String) - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    Method for fortification operation

    H

    initiateContinents(String) - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    initiatePlayers(List<String>) - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    initiatePlayers(List<String>) - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    create Player object for every Player, and add the observer Players are allocated a number of initial armies notify CountryView (country info notify PlayerView (current player) notify View (state and additional info)

    isConnected(Country, Country) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Verify if two countries is connected
    isContain(Country) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Is country c include in the countries owned
    isCountryAConnectedGraph(Country) - Static method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidator
    Check whether a country forms a connected graph or not.
    isCountryUniquelyAssociated(Model) - Static method in class com.risk.validate.MapValidator
    Check if the countries are uniquely associated with the continent.

    isDefenderLoose(Country, Country) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Verify if defender loose the country

    isEmptyArmy() - Method in class com.risk.model.Player

    isGg() - Method in class com.risk.model.Player

    isLastPlayer() - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    Check if current player is the last player, and go to the different movement

    check if the next player is the compute player

    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Move number of armies to the new conquered country
    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.AggressiveStrategy
    Move army method move the mininum armies that could
    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.BenevolentStrategy
    moveArmy method no attacks, no victory, no move army
    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.CheaterStrategy
    moveArmy method doesn't do anything in cheater strategy
    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.HumanStrategy
    Move number of armies to the new conquered country
    moveArmy(String) - Method in interface com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    move army method after conquer
    moveArmy(String) - Method in class com.risk.strategy.RandomStrategy
    Move a random number of armies from attacking country to recently conquered country

    newGamePane - Variable in class com.risk.controller.MenuController

    nextPhaseButton - Variable in class com.risk.view.GeneralComponents
     
    nextPlayer() - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    nextPlayer() - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    Set current player to the next one according in round robin fashion If a new round starts from the next player, send ROUND_ROBIN STATE to view Considerations: 1.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum com.risk.common.Action
     
    nonStaticToStatic() - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
    copy non static data member value from static data member used before serialization
    NORMAL_WIDTH - Static variable in class com.risk.mapeditor.Edge
     
    normalColor - Static variable in class com.risk.mapeditor.Edge
     
    numArmiesMovedLabel - Variable in class com.risk.view.GeneralComponents
     
    numArmiesMovedTextField - Variable in class com.risk.view.GeneralComponents
     
    numPlayerInstructionLabel - Variable in class com.risk.controller.MenuController
     
    NumPlayerMenu - Class in com.risk.model
    Instruction: Within Model's loadFile() method if file is valid call setVisible(true); call setValidationResult(false, "Total Player: NONE") call setMaxNumPlayer(int) else call setVisible(false) then call update(); Within Model's initiatePlayer() method if player number is valid call setValidationResult(true, "") else call setValidationResult(false, "invalid Info") then call update()
    NumPlayerMenu() - Constructor for class com.risk.model.NumPlayerMenu
    default ctor
    NumPlayerMenuView - Class in com.risk.view
    Display the player number relative menu components
    NumPlayerMenuView() - Constructor for class com.risk.view.NumPlayerMenuView
    Default ctor
    numPlayerTextField - Variable in class com.risk.controller.MenuController
     

    O

    obj - Variable in class com.risk.common.Message
     
    openCardWindow() - Method in class com.risk.controller.MapController
    Called when user clicks Card Button Open card exchange window
    openFile() - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.ViewController
    Handler for btnOpen
    openMap() - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.View
    Open an existing map Add current View object as observer to model.Model, to receive file validation info
    openMapEditor() - Method in class com.risk.view.View
    Display map editor, user than can create a RISK map Called by Menu
    openReadOnlyCardWindow() - Method in class com.risk.controller.CardController
    card button open read only card ex window

    P

    Phase - Class in com.risk.model
    Observable Phase class, store 1) the name of the game phase currently being played 2) the current player's name 3) information about actions that are taking place during this phase
    phaseLabel - Variable in class com.risk.view.GeneralComponents
     
    phaseNumber - Static variable in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    phaseNumberNonStatic - Variable in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    PhaseView - Class in com.risk.view
    Observer Phase class, store 1) the name of the game phase currently being played 2) the current player's name 3) information about actions that are taking place during this phase
    player - Variable in class com.risk.strategy.AbstractStrategy
     
    Player - Class in com.risk.model
    Define class of a player The following is only base code, further features need to be added

    PlayersWorldDomination - Class in com.risk.model
    Observable PlayerWorldDomination class, display 1) the percentage of the map controlled by every player 2) the continents controlled by every player 3) the total number of armies owned by every player
    PlayersWorldDominationView - Class in com.risk.view
    Observer PlayerWorldDominationView class, display 1) the percentage of the map controlled by every player 2) the continents controlled by every player 3) the total number of armies owned by every player

    playerThreeTypeChoiceBox - Variable in class com.risk.controller.MenuController

    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.model.Model
     
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.model.Player
    Implementation of reinforcement
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayerManager
    Reinforcement phaseNumber Set new current player Add armies to the player CardModel exchange for armies
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.AggressiveStrategy
    Reinforcement method reinforces its strongest country
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.BenevolentStrategy
    Reinforcement method reinforces its weakest countries
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.CheaterStrategy
    reinforcement method doubles the number of armies on all its countries
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.HumanStrategy
    Implementation of reinforcement
    reinforcement() - Method in interface com.risk.strategy.PlayerBehaviorStrategy
    reinforcement method
    reinforcement() - Method in class com.risk.strategy.RandomStrategy
    Reinforcement operation for random player

    Relocate the coordinates from scene to local, and align the center to the cursor position

    removeEdge(Edge) - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.Country
    remove an dege from the edge list
    removeFromCountryList(Country) - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.ViewController
    Remove a country from the list keeping country positions when deleted

    Overall handler for the change of armies, will call observers
    setArmies(long) - Method in class com.risk.model.Player

    combined notify observer method
    update() - Method in class com.risk.model.NumPlayerMenu
    combined notify observer method
    update() - Method in class com.risk.model.Phase
    Model call this when finish calling any setXXX() method within this class i.e. call setCurrentPhase("Start Up Phase"), then must call update()
    update() - Method in class com.risk.model.PlayersWorldDomination
    Model call this method after calling all of the following setter functions
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.CardView
    override update method
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.CountryView
    Observer update method, update all Country info, store and set it to countryPane Called by corresponding Country Observable subject
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.FileInfoMenuView
    Standard Observer update method
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.NumPlayerMenuView

    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.PhaseView
    Observer standard update method
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class com.risk.view.PlayersWorldDominationView
    Standard Observer update method

    Receive new labels' info, update them Called by CountryView for updating labels' info

    values() - Static method in enum com.risk.common.Action
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.

    View - Class in com.risk.mapeditor
    Model class for View (root_pane) in map editor In order to unify model.Model notify mechanism, implements Observer to receive file validation info
    View - Class in com.risk.view
    View, support user interaction, do partial user input validation Corresponding Observable subject is Model
    View() - Constructor for class com.risk.mapeditor.View
    Constructor Loads ViewEditor.fxml file for layout, initialize View object, and global continents list
    View() - Constructor for class com.risk.view.View
    Initiate menu/map stages with corresponding .fxml file, set some default variables
    ViewController - Class in com.risk.mapeditor
    Controller class for View object
    ViewController() - Constructor for class com.risk.mapeditor.ViewController
     

    W

    WIN - Enum constant in enum com.risk.common.Action

    new thread to automatically run the strategy execute method
    WorkerThread(Player, Model) - Constructor for class com.risk.model.WorkerThread
    constructor of WorkerThread
    write() - Method in class com.risk.mapeditor.Writer
    This method is to write all the information to a specific file
    Writer - Class in com.risk.mapeditor
    this class is to generate standard map file
    Writer(ArrayList<Country>, Path) - Constructor for class com.risk.mapeditor.Writer
